ratification_note: Awaiting Ender ratification. A-TIER 93.6% ≥ 85% threshold. BLG-P35-01 open (see below).

scores.label: Problem clarity
scores.notes: Constitutional invariant concept precisely stated; procluding vs refutation distinction is unambiguous.

scores.label: Spec completeness
scores.notes: ProcludingPremiseGate, ConstitutionalInvariant, PremiseViolationEvent, PremiseViolationError all specified. T0+KILL enforcement in dataclass __post_init__.

scores.label: Use case coverage
scores.notes: Credit/justice prototype spec covers 4 scenarios. Domain-specific premise_check_fn not yet implemented (-1).

scores.label: Implementation artifact quality
scores.notes: procluding_premise.py: frozen dataclass, immutable frozenset, fail-fast KILL, SHA-256 input hash, export_log JSON. Clean.

scores.label: Test coverage
scores.notes: 12 governance contract tests. P-03 × 4 contract structure satisfied. All 4 contracts per gate tested. DGAF invariant set smoke tests included.

scores.label: Tradeoff documentation
scores.notes: Tradeoffs in registry entry cover fail-fast, immutability, KILL non-recoverability. Domain check_fn injection gap noted but not fully quantified (-1).

scores.label: Pattern interaction map
scores.notes: P-35 → TGL Step 0 → P-29 risk_block → P-01 dead-letter chain fully documented. maps_to field in JSON entry covers 4 architectural anchors.

scores.label: NIST / EU AI Act alignment
scores.notes: INV-03 Human Rights maps directly to EU AI Act Art.5 (prohibited practices). INV-04 audit trail maps to Art.13. INV-05 authority order maps to Art.14 (human oversight).

scores.label: Session anchor integrity
scores.notes: procluding_premise_first state anchor goal satisfied. SESSION_ANCHOR S068 updated with registration record. Audit trail complete.

scores.label: BLG resolution status
scores.notes: BLG-P35-01 open: domain-specific premise_check_fn not yet implemented for credit/justice domains. Tracked. Resolved by OI-01/OI-02 in prototype spec.

scores.label: Adoption recommendation
scores.notes: Strong adoption case for any governance system with constitutional invariants. Slight gap: integration with IntegratedOrchestrator not yet wired (OI-05 open). Recommendation is conditional ADOPT pending OI-05.

blgs.description: Domain-specific premise_check_fn not yet implemented for credit proxy detection (OI-01) or justice recidivism detection (OI-02). Gate is fully implemented and tested with injected check_fn; production deployment requires domain corpus.

promotion_path: A-TIER ≥ 85% with 1 open minor BLG. Eligible for canonical promotion with Ender ratification.
summary: P-35 Procluding Premise Gate scores A-TIER at 93.6% (103/110). Pattern is architecturally sound, fully specified, 12 governance contract tests pass, all 5 DGAF canonical invariants registered. Single open BLG (domain check_fn) is a production deployment gap, not a design gap. Recommend A-TIER canonical promotion pending Ender ratification.
